attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
 ST.TRANSACTION_ID ,
 ST.APPLICATION_NAME ,
 ST.APPLICATION_ID ,
 ST.LEDGER_ID      ,
 ST.ORG_ID         ,
 ST.TRX_CLASS  ,
 ST.TRX_DATE       ,
 /*ST.ORDER_LINE_ID  ,
 ST.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,
 ST.TRX_NUMBER    ,
 ST.TRX_LINE_ID    ,
 ST.TRX_LINE_NUM   ,*/
 ST.TRANSACTION_SOURCE,
 ST.AMOUNT,
 ST.QUANTITY_INVOICED  AS ORDER_QUANTITY,
 ST.CURRENCY_CODE,
 ST.ATTRIBUTE13,
 ST.ATTRIBUTE11,
 ST.ATTRIBUTE15,
 ST.ATTRIBUTE9,
 ST.ATTRIBUTE10,
 ST.ATTRIBUTE8,
 ST.DATE_ATTRIBUTE47,
 ST.DATE_ATTRIBUTE48,
 ST.ATTRIBUTE16,
 ST.ATTRIBUTE14,
 ST.ATTRIBUTE4,
 ST.ATTRIBUTE12,
 ST.DATE_ATTRIBUTE49,
 ST.ATTRIBUTE18,
 ST.DATE_ATTRIBUTE50,
 ST.SKU,
 ST.ATTRIBUTE5,
 ST.RULE_START_DATE,
 ST.RULE_END_DATE,
 ST.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,
 ST.ATTRIBUTE29,
 ST.NUM_ATTRIBUTE54,
ST.ELEMENT_TYPE,
ST.ACCOUNTING_RULE_DURATION,
 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DATETIME,
 USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME   ,
 USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
 ST.ATTRIBUTE21,
 ST.ATTRIBUTE22,
 ST.ATTRIBUTE23,
 ST.ATTRIBUTE24,
 ST.CUSTOMER_ID,
 ST.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,
 ST.ORDER_NUMBER,
 ST.ORDER_LINE_ID,
 ST.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,
 ST.ATTRIBUTE40,
 ST.ATTRIBUTE41,
 ST.ATTRIBUTE42
 
 FROM $$STGDB.ST_CG_XXCFIR_REV_EXTRACT_SWSS  ST
 WHERE  NOT EXISTS (
 SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCFIR_REV_EXTRACT_SWSS  EL
 WHERE
 EL.TRANSACTION_ID= ST.TRANSACTION_ID
 AND EL.APPLICATION_ID = ST.APPLICATION_ID)
